race.comment: GRAND OMAHA (4) had been racing well in Victoria and brought that good form north last start when in the money in a Listed race over the mile at Gosford. Finds the line as though she needs this trip. Good chance in a wide-open race. SOVERATO (3) has been freshened up since failing to run the trip in the Australian Oaks six weeks ago. Best performance to date was in the Adrian Knox over this distance. Must be a chance despite the gap between runs. SINGLE RED (1) raced on the pace but just found one better in the Gold Coast Bracelet over 1800m recently. Ran Ohope Wins to 0.6 lengths over 2100m in New Zealand. Has the class to take this out. PARVENU (10) takes a quantum leap today but is going well and has plenty of upside.
